title: ChudSphere
description: It's a joke mod of the "ChudSphere" from wonderland.jar and the ChudSphere in question is a multitool/entity that is tameable
body:
**ChudSphere** is a joke mod based off of a joke a user made in _wonderland.jar_ because well it's funny who doesn't want to play a funny mod am I right? So please play it and if you do your coool but that's it sorry to the modrinth mods who have to review this stupid mod.

**Discord -** https://discord.gg/PyHYf5KV4c

**With help from.**

**flamingman54 - DualFusion Owner and Partner**

**galacticglitch__ - Co Owner of DualFusion**

**leoargon.mc - Content Creation**
